hero.description: Our journey began with a simple idea.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Empowering developers and businesses with elegant, fast, and intuitive tools to build outstanding digital products.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the platform of choice for modern developers who value beauty, performance, and user experience in every line of code.

story.title:
Driven by passion,
defined by excellence.
story.para1: Our journey began with a simple idea: to make web development accessible and enjoyable for everyone. We were tired of heavy frameworks and complicated configurations.
story.para2: Today, we are a diverse team of engineers, designers, and thinkers working together to solve complex problems with elegant solutions.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every decision we make.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: We truly love what we do, and it reflects in every detail of our products.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Working together brings out the best results. We believe in the strength of a united team.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Continuously seeking better ways to solve problems and create lasting value.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: Honesty and transparency form the foundation of every relationship we build.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We are never satisfied with good enough. We always strive for the very best.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Clean code, beautiful design, and seamless experiences are the standard we uphold.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.subtitle: The brilliant minds behind every line of code we write.
team.alex_desc: Visionary leader with over 10 years of experience in building SaaS ecosystems.
team.sarah_desc: Full-stack wizard specialising in building large-scale system architecture.
team.mike_desc: Obsessed with pixel-perfect detail, smooth UX flows, and accessibility standards.
team.jessica_desc: Creative storyteller helping brands discover their unique voice in the digital world.
